name: Athletic Performance & Recovery
description: Muscle fiber composition, VO2 max response, injury susceptibility, recovery speed.

snps.description: Alpha-actinin-3 in fast-twitch muscle. XX (TT) genotype lacks functional protein — common in endurance athletes, rare in elite sprinters.

TT.note: XX — endurance-oriented; functional alpha-actinin-3 absent from fast-twitch fibers.

snps.description: Fatty-acid oxidation regulator; G allele associated with power phenotype, C with endurance.
Master regulator of mitochondrial biogenesis; associated with VO2 max trainability.

AA.note: Reduced aerobic trainability — higher volume may be needed to reach same gains.

snps.description: Type V collagen; variants influence tendon/ligament stiffness and soft-tissue injury risk.

CC.note: Stiffer tendons — higher rupture risk at extremes.

snps.description: Regulates IL-6 expression; C allele associated with lower inflammation and faster recovery.

GG.note: Higher inflammatory response — longer recovery windows may help.

CC.note: Lower inflammatory response — faster recovery profile.
